_comment: DEMAND-LOOP-1 realness filter config, read live by demand_loop.py (mtime-cached, fail-safe). 'enabled' is the ONE flip that lets the loop ACT (open tickets / later send invites). It stays false until David flips it, naturally when RM-5 outreach un-pauses. A missing/broken/empty file falls back to safe defaults with enabled=false, so it can only ever DISABLE the loop. Tune thresholds/weights/floors here against the --report output; no code edit, no redeploy.
_dryrun: While enabled=false the filter still SCORES every miss so `python3 demand_loop.py --report` shows exactly what WOULD open a ticket — you see the loop's real volume before a single email is sent.
